```{r model_2, cache = TRUE, include = FALSE}
non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_stemp_sdist_year_Obj = MakeADFun( data=non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_stemp_sdist_year_Data,
                                                            parameters=non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_stemp_sdist_year_Params,
                                                            random= c("omega_s", "epsilon_st", "b_smooth"),
                                                            DLL = "non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_stemp_sdist_year")

# Optimize
non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_stemp_sdist_year_Opt = nlminb( start=non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_stemp_sdist_year_Obj$par, obj=non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_stemp_sdist_year_Obj$fn, grad=non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_stemp_sdist_year_Obj$gr )
# add getJointPrecision for index
non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_stemp_sdist_year_Opt$SD = sdreport( non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_stemp_sdist_year_Obj, bias.correct=TRUE, getJointPrecision = TRUE )
non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_stemp_sdist_year_report = non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_stemp_sdist_year_Obj$report()

non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_stemp_sdist_year_output <- list(non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_stemp_sdist_year_Obj = non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_stemp_sdist_year_Obj,
                                                          non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_stemp_sdist_year_Opt = non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_stemp_sdist_year_Opt,
                                                          non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_stemp_sdist_year_report = non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_stemp_sdist_year_report)

save(non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_stemp_sdist_year_output,
     file = here::here("R", "04_SDM_model_selection", "04.6_non_cancer_crab_larvae_SDM", "non_cancer_crab_larvae_fixed_effects_candidate_models", "non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_stemp_sdist_year_output.rda"))
```

#### Model 3: Year (factor) + temperature (linear)

```{r model_3, cache = TRUE, include = FALSE}
compile(here::here("R", "04_SDM_model_selection", "04.6_non_cancer_crab_larvae_SDM", "non_cancer_crab_larvae_fixed_effects_candidate_models", "non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_temp_year.cpp"))
dyn.load(dynlib(here::here("R", "04_SDM_model_selection", "04.6_non_cancer_crab_larvae_SDM", "non_cancer_crab_larvae_fixed_effects_candidate_models", "non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_temp_year")))

non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_temp_year_Data = list(
  # number of years
  "n_t" = length(unique(jsoes_bongo_biomass_non_cancer_crab_larvae$year)),
  # weights (all 1)
  "weights_i" = rep(1, length(jsoes_bongo_biomass_non_cancer_crab_larvae$total_sum_of_final_carbon_mg_m3)),
  # temperature data
  "temp_i" = jsoes_bongo_biomass_non_cancer_crab_larvae$SST_scaled,
  "temp_gt" = temperature_projection_matrix,
  # distance data
  # "dist_i" = jsoes_bongo_biomass_non_cancer_crab_larvae$dist_shore_scaled,
  # "dist_g" = distance_projection_vector,
  
  # Subyearling Interior Fall Chinook data
  "D_i"= jsoes_bongo_biomass_non_cancer_crab_larvae$total_sum_of_final_carbon_mg_m3, "t_i" = jsoes_bongo_biomass_non_cancer_crab_larvae$year - min(jsoes_bongo_biomass_non_cancer_crab_larvae$year),
  "A_gs"=A_gs_non_cancer_crab_larvae,
  "A_is"=A_is_non_cancer_crab_larvae,
  # "M0_b"=bongo_biomass_spde$c0, "M1_b"=bongo_biomass_spde$g1, "M2_b"=bongo_biomass_spde$g2,
  "spatial_list" = spatial_list_non_cancer_crab_larvae
)


non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_temp_year_Params <- list(
  
  ## SDM parameters
  "beta_t"=rep(0, length(unique(jsoes_bongo_biomass_non_cancer_crab_larvae$year))),
  "beta_temp" = 0,
  # "beta_dist" = 0,
  "ln_tau_epsilon"=0,
  "ln_tau_omega"=0, 
  "ln_kappa"=0,
  "ln_phi" = 0,
  # "ln_H_input" = c(0, 0),
  "finv_power" = 0,
  
  "logit_rhoE" = 0,
  
  # SDM random effects
  "omega_s"=rnorm(nrow(bongo_biomass_spde$c0)),
  "epsilon_st"=matrix(0, nrow=nrow(bongo_biomass_spde$c0), ncol=non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_temp_year_Data$n_t)
  # 
)

non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_temp_year_Obj = MakeADFun( data=non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_temp_year_Data,
                                                                 parameters=non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_temp_year_Params,
                                                                 random= c("omega_s", "epsilon_st"),
                                                                 DLL = "non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_temp_year")

# Optimize
non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_temp_year_Opt = nlminb( start=non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_temp_year_Obj$par, obj=non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_temp_year_Obj$fn, grad=non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_temp_year_Obj$gr )
# add getJointPrecision for index
non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_temp_year_Opt$SD = sdreport( non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_temp_year_Obj, bias.correct=TRUE, getJointPrecision = TRUE )
non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_temp_year_report = non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_temp_year_Obj$report()

non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_temp_year_output <- list(non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_temp_year_Obj = non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_temp_year_Obj,
                                                               non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_temp_year_Opt = non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_temp_year_Opt,
                                                               non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_temp_year_report = non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_temp_year_report)

save(non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_temp_year_output,
     file = here::here("R", "04_SDM_model_selection", "04.6_non_cancer_crab_larvae_SDM", "non_cancer_crab_larvae_candidate_models", "non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_temp_year_output.rda"))
```

#### Model 4: Year (factor) + distance from shore (linear)

```{r model_4, cache = TRUE, include = FALSE}
compile(here::here("R", "04_SDM_model_selection", "04.6_non_cancer_crab_larvae_SDM", "non_cancer_crab_larvae_fixed_effects_candidate_models", "non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_dist_year.cpp"))
dyn.load(dynlib(here::here("R", "04_SDM_model_selection", "04.6_non_cancer_crab_larvae_SDM", "non_cancer_crab_larvae_fixed_effects_candidate_models", "non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_dist_year")))

non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_dist_year_Data = list(
  # number of years
  "n_t" = length(unique(jsoes_bongo_biomass_non_cancer_crab_larvae$year)),
  # weights (all 1)
  "weights_i" = rep(1, length(jsoes_bongo_biomass_non_cancer_crab_larvae$total_sum_of_final_carbon_mg_m3)),
  # temperature data
  # "temp_i" = jsoes_bongo_biomass_non_cancer_crab_larvae$SST_scaled,
  # "temp_gt" = temperature_projection_matrix,
  # distance data
  "dist_i" = jsoes_bongo_biomass_non_cancer_crab_larvae$dist_shore_scaled,
  "dist_g" = distance_projection_vector,
  
  # Subyearling Interior Fall Chinook data
  "D_i"= jsoes_bongo_biomass_non_cancer_crab_larvae$total_sum_of_final_carbon_mg_m3, "t_i" = jsoes_bongo_biomass_non_cancer_crab_larvae$year - min(jsoes_bongo_biomass_non_cancer_crab_larvae$year),
  "A_gs"=A_gs_non_cancer_crab_larvae,
  "A_is"=A_is_non_cancer_crab_larvae,
  # "M0_b"=bongo_biomass_spde$c0, "M1_b"=bongo_biomass_spde$g1, "M2_b"=bongo_biomass_spde$g2,
  "spatial_list" = spatial_list_non_cancer_crab_larvae
)


non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_dist_year_Params <- list(
  
  ## SDM parameters
  "beta_t"=rep(0, length(unique(jsoes_bongo_biomass_non_cancer_crab_larvae$year))),
  # "beta_temp" = 0,
  "beta_dist" = 0,
  "ln_tau_epsilon"=0,
  "ln_tau_omega"=0, 
  "ln_kappa"=0,
  "ln_phi" = 0,
  # "ln_H_input" = c(0, 0),
  "finv_power" = 0,
  
  "logit_rhoE" = 0,
  
  # SDM random effects
  "omega_s"=rnorm(nrow(bongo_biomass_spde$c0)),
  "epsilon_st"=matrix(0, nrow=nrow(bongo_biomass_spde$c0), ncol=non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_dist_year_Data$n_t)
  # 
)

non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_dist_year_Obj = MakeADFun( data=non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_dist_year_Data,
                                           parameters=non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_dist_year_Params,
                                           random= c("omega_s", "epsilon_st"),
                                           DLL = "non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_dist_year")

# Optimize
non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_dist_year_Opt = nlminb( start=non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_dist_year_Obj$par, obj=non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_dist_year_Obj$fn, grad=non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_dist_year_Obj$gr )
# add getJointPrecision for index
non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_dist_year_Opt$SD = sdreport( non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_dist_year_Obj, bias.correct=TRUE, getJointPrecision = TRUE )
non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_dist_year_report = non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_dist_year_Obj$report()

non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_dist_year_output <- list(non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_dist_year_Obj = non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_dist_year_Obj,
                                         non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_dist_year_Opt = non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_dist_year_Opt,
                                         non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_dist_year_report = non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_dist_year_report)

save(non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_dist_year_output,
     file = here::here("R", "04_SDM_model_selection", "04.6_non_cancer_crab_larvae_SDM", "non_cancer_crab_larvae_candidate_models", "non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_dist_year_output.rda"))
```

#### Model 5: Year (factor) + temperature (smooth spline)

```{r model_5, cache = TRUE, include = FALSE}
# to get the sdmTMB code to work, you just need to make sure that you provide the smooth terms in a formula (no need to write the complete formula)
sm <- parse_smoothers(formula = "total_sum_of_final_carbon_mg_m3 ~ s(SST_scaled)", data = as.data.frame(jsoes_bongo_biomass_non_cancer_crab_larvae), knots = NULL)

# get smoother values for predict grid
predict_grid <- data.frame(SST_scaled = as.vector(temperature_projection_matrix))

sm_predict <- parse_smoothers(formula = "total_sum_of_final_carbon_mg_m3 ~ s(SST_scaled)", data = as.data.frame(jsoes_bongo_biomass_non_cancer_crab_larvae), knots = NULL,
                              newdata = predict_grid, basis_prev = sm$basis_out)

compile(here::here("R", "04_SDM_model_selection", "04.6_non_cancer_crab_larvae_SDM", "non_cancer_crab_larvae_fixed_effects_candidate_models",  "non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_stemp_year.cpp"))
dyn.load(dynlib(here::here("R", "04_SDM_model_selection", "04.6_non_cancer_crab_larvae_SDM", "non_cancer_crab_larvae_fixed_effects_candidate_models", "non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_stemp_year")))

non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_stemp_year_Data = list(
  # number of years
  "n_t" = length(unique(jsoes_bongo_biomass_non_cancer_crab_larvae$year)),
  # weights (all 1)
  "weights_i" = rep(1, length(jsoes_bongo_biomass_non_cancer_crab_larvae$total_sum_of_final_carbon_mg_m3)),
  # temperature data
  "temp_i" = jsoes_bongo_biomass_non_cancer_crab_larvae$SST_scaled,
  "temp_gt" = temperature_projection_matrix,
  # distance data
  # "dist_i" = jsoes_bongo_biomass_non_cancer_crab_larvae$dist_shore_scaled,
  # "dist_g" = distance_projection_vector,
  
  # Subyearling Interior Fall Chinook data
  "D_i"= jsoes_bongo_biomass_non_cancer_crab_larvae$total_sum_of_final_carbon_mg_m3, "t_i" = jsoes_bongo_biomass_non_cancer_crab_larvae$year - min(jsoes_bongo_biomass_non_cancer_crab_larvae$year),
  "A_gs"=A_gs_non_cancer_crab_larvae,
  "A_is"=A_is_non_cancer_crab_larvae,
  # "M0_b"=bongo_biomass_spde$c0, "M1_b"=bongo_biomass_spde$g1, "M2_b"=bongo_biomass_spde$g2,
  "spatial_list" = spatial_list_non_cancer_crab_larvae,
  
  # smooth function data
  "Zs" = sm$Zs, # smoother basis function matrices
  "Xs" = sm$Xs, # smoother linear effect matrix
  "b_smooth_start" = sm$b_smooth_start,
  proj_Zs = sm_predict$Zs,
  proj_Xs = sm_predict$Xs
)

non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_stemp_year_Params <- list(
  
  ## SDM parameters
  "beta_t"=rep(0, length(unique(jsoes_bongo_biomass_non_cancer_crab_larvae$year))),
  # "beta_temp" = 0,
  # "beta_dist" = 0,
  "ln_tau_epsilon"=0,
  "ln_tau_omega"=0, 
  "ln_kappa"=0,
  "ln_phi" = 0,
  # "ln_H_input" = c(0, 0),
  "finv_power" = 0,
  
  "logit_rhoE" = 0,
  
  # SDM random effects
  "omega_s"=rnorm(nrow(bongo_biomass_spde$c0)),
  "epsilon_st"=matrix(0, nrow=nrow(bongo_biomass_spde$c0), ncol=non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_stemp_year_Data$n_t),
  
  # smooth functions
  bs = rep(0, ncol(sm$Xs)),
  b_smooth = rep(0, sum(sm$sm_dims)),
  ln_smooth_sigma = rep(0, length(sm$sm_dims))
)

non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_stemp_year_Obj = MakeADFun( data=non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_stemp_year_Data,
                                                  parameters=non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_stemp_year_Params,
                                                  random= c("omega_s", "epsilon_st", "b_smooth"),
                                                  DLL = "non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_stemp_year")

# Optimize
non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_stemp_year_Opt = nlminb( start=non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_stemp_year_Obj$par, obj=non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_stemp_year_Obj$fn, grad=non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_stemp_year_Obj$gr )
# add getJointPrecision for index
non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_stemp_year_Opt$SD = sdreport( non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_stemp_year_Obj, bias.correct=TRUE, getJointPrecision = TRUE )
non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_stemp_year_report = non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_stemp_year_Obj$report()

non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_stemp_year_output <- list(non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_stemp_year_Obj = non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_stemp_year_Obj,
                                                non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_stemp_year_Opt = non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_stemp_year_Opt,
                                                non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_stemp_year_report = non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_stemp_year_report)

save(non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_stemp_year_output,
     file = here::here("R", "04_SDM_model_selection", "04.6_non_cancer_crab_larvae_SDM", "non_cancer_crab_larvae_fixed_effects_candidate_models", "non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_stemp_year_output.rda"))
```

#### Model 6: Year (factor) + s(dist)

```{r model_6, cache = TRUE, include = FALSE}
# to get the sdmTMB code to work, you just need to make sure that you provide the smooth terms in a formula (no need to write the complete formula)
sm <- parse_smoothers(formula = "total_sum_of_final_carbon_mg_m3 ~ s(dist_shore_scaled)", data = as.data.frame(jsoes_bongo_biomass_non_cancer_crab_larvae), knots = NULL)

# get smoother values for predict grid
predict_grid <- data.frame(
  dist_shore_scaled = rep(distance_projection_vector, ncol(temperature_projection_matrix)))

sm_predict <- parse_smoothers(formula = "total_sum_of_final_carbon_mg_m3 ~ s(dist_shore_scaled)", data = as.data.frame(jsoes_bongo_biomass_non_cancer_crab_larvae), knots = NULL,
                              newdata = predict_grid, basis_prev = sm$basis_out)


save.image("jsoes_bongo_biomass_non_cancer_crab_larvae_model_selection.RData")
# load("jsoes_bongo_biomass_non_cancer_crab_larvae_model_selection.RData")

compile(here::here("R", "04_SDM_model_selection", "04.6_non_cancer_crab_larvae_SDM", "non_cancer_crab_larvae_fixed_effects_candidate_models",  "non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_sdist_year.cpp"))
dyn.load(dynlib(here::here("R", "04_SDM_model_selection", "04.6_non_cancer_crab_larvae_SDM", "non_cancer_crab_larvae_fixed_effects_candidate_models", "non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_sdist_year")))

non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_sdist_year_Data = list(
  # number of years
  "n_t" = length(unique(jsoes_bongo_biomass_non_cancer_crab_larvae$year)),
  # weights (all 1)
  "weights_i" = rep(1, length(jsoes_bongo_biomass_non_cancer_crab_larvae$total_sum_of_final_carbon_mg_m3)),
  # temperature data
  # "temp_i" = jsoes_bongo_biomass_non_cancer_crab_larvae$SST_scaled,
  # "temp_gt" = temperature_projection_matrix,
  # distance data
  "dist_i" = jsoes_bongo_biomass_non_cancer_crab_larvae$dist_shore_scaled,
  "dist_g" = distance_projection_vector,
  
  # Subyearling Interior Fall Chinook data
  "D_i"= jsoes_bongo_biomass_non_cancer_crab_larvae$total_sum_of_final_carbon_mg_m3, "t_i" = jsoes_bongo_biomass_non_cancer_crab_larvae$year - min(jsoes_bongo_biomass_non_cancer_crab_larvae$year),
  "A_gs"=A_gs_non_cancer_crab_larvae,
  "A_is"=A_is_non_cancer_crab_larvae,
  # "M0_b"=bongo_biomass_spde$c0, "M1_b"=bongo_biomass_spde$g1, "M2_b"=bongo_biomass_spde$g2,
  "spatial_list" = spatial_list_non_cancer_crab_larvae,
  
  # smooth function data
  "Zs" = sm$Zs, # smoother basis function matrices
  "Xs" = sm$Xs, # smoother linear effect matrix
  "b_smooth_start" = sm$b_smooth_start,
  proj_Zs = sm_predict$Zs,
  proj_Xs = sm_predict$Xs
)

non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_sdist_year_Params <- list(
  
  ## SDM parameters
  "beta_t"=rep(0, length(unique(jsoes_bongo_biomass_non_cancer_crab_larvae$year))),
  # "beta_temp" = 0,
  # "beta_dist" = 0,
  "ln_tau_epsilon"=0,
  "ln_tau_omega"=0, 
  "ln_kappa"=0,
  "ln_phi" = 0,
  # "ln_H_input" = c(0, 0),
  "finv_power" = 0,
  
  "logit_rhoE" = 0,
  
  # SDM random effects
  "omega_s"=rnorm(nrow(bongo_biomass_spde$c0)),
  "epsilon_st"=matrix(0, nrow=nrow(bongo_biomass_spde$c0), ncol=non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_sdist_year_Data$n_t),
  
  # smooth functions
  bs = rep(0, ncol(sm$Xs)),
  b_smooth = rep(0, sum(sm$sm_dims)),
  ln_smooth_sigma = rep(0, length(sm$sm_dims))
)

non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_sdist_year_Obj = MakeADFun( data=non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_sdist_year_Data,
                                                  parameters=non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_sdist_year_Params,
                                                  random= c("omega_s", "epsilon_st", "b_smooth"),
                                                  DLL = "non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_sdist_year")

# Optimize
non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_sdist_year_Opt = nlminb( start=non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_sdist_year_Obj$par, obj=non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_sdist_year_Obj$fn, grad=non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_sdist_year_Obj$gr )
# add getJointPrecision for index
non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_sdist_year_Opt$SD = sdreport( non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_sdist_year_Obj, bias.correct=TRUE, getJointPrecision = TRUE )
non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_sdist_year_report = non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_sdist_year_Obj$report()

non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_sdist_year_output <- list(non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_sdist_year_Obj = non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_sdist_year_Obj,
                                                non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_sdist_year_Opt = non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_sdist_year_Opt,
                                                non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_sdist_year_report = non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_sdist_year_report)

save(non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_sdist_year_output,
     file = here::here("R", "04_SDM_model_selection", "04.6_non_cancer_crab_larvae_SDM", "non_cancer_crab_larvae_fixed_effects_candidate_models", "non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_sdist_year_output.rda"))
```

#### Model 7: Year (factor)

```{r model_7, cache = TRUE, include = FALSE}
compile(here::here("R", "04_SDM_model_selection", "04.6_non_cancer_crab_larvae_SDM", "non_cancer_crab_larvae_fixed_effects_candidate_models", "non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_year.cpp"))
dyn.load(dynlib(here::here("R", "04_SDM_model_selection", "04.6_non_cancer_crab_larvae_SDM", "non_cancer_crab_larvae_fixed_effects_candidate_models", "non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_year")))

non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_year_Data = list(
  # number of years
  "n_t" = length(unique(jsoes_bongo_biomass_non_cancer_crab_larvae$year)),
  # weights (all 1)
  "weights_i" = rep(1, length(jsoes_bongo_biomass_non_cancer_crab_larvae$total_sum_of_final_carbon_mg_m3)),
  # temperature data
  # "temp_i" = jsoes_bongo_biomass_non_cancer_crab_larvae$SST_scaled,
  # "temp_gt" = temperature_projection_matrix,
  # distance data
  # "dist_i" = jsoes_bongo_biomass_non_cancer_crab_larvae$dist_shore_scaled,
  # "dist_g" = distance_projection_vector,
  
  # Subyearling Interior Fall Chinook data
  "D_i"= jsoes_bongo_biomass_non_cancer_crab_larvae$total_sum_of_final_carbon_mg_m3, "t_i" = jsoes_bongo_biomass_non_cancer_crab_larvae$year - min(jsoes_bongo_biomass_non_cancer_crab_larvae$year),
  "A_gs"=A_gs_non_cancer_crab_larvae,
  "A_is"=A_is_non_cancer_crab_larvae,
  # "M0_b"=bongo_biomass_spde$c0, "M1_b"=bongo_biomass_spde$g1, "M2_b"=bongo_biomass_spde$g2,
  "spatial_list" = spatial_list_non_cancer_crab_larvae
)


non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_year_Params <- list(
  
  ## SDM parameters
  "beta_t"=rep(0, length(unique(jsoes_bongo_biomass_non_cancer_crab_larvae$year))),
  # "beta_temp" = 0,
  # "beta_dist" = 0,
  "ln_tau_epsilon"=0,
  "ln_tau_omega"=0, 
  "ln_kappa"=0,
  "ln_phi" = 0,
  # "ln_H_input" = c(0, 0),
  "finv_power" = 0,
  
  "logit_rhoE" = 0,
  
  # SDM random effects
  "omega_s"=rnorm(nrow(bongo_biomass_spde$c0)),
  "epsilon_st"=matrix(0, nrow=nrow(bongo_biomass_spde$c0), ncol=non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_year_Data$n_t)
  # 
)

non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_year_Obj = MakeADFun( data=non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_year_Data,
                                           parameters=non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_year_Params,
                                           random= c("omega_s", "epsilon_st"),
                                           DLL = "non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_year")

# Optimize
non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_year_Opt = nlminb( start=non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_year_Obj$par, obj=non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_year_Obj$fn, grad=non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_year_Obj$gr )
# add getJointPrecision for index
non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_year_Opt$SD = sdreport( non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_year_Obj, bias.correct=TRUE, getJointPrecision = TRUE )
non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_year_report = non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_year_Obj$report()

non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_year_output <- list(non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_year_Obj = non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_year_Obj,
                                         non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_year_Opt = non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_year_Opt,
                                         non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_year_report = non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_year_report)

save(non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_year_output,
     file = here::here("R", "04_SDM_model_selection", "04.6_non_cancer_crab_larvae_SDM", "non_cancer_crab_larvae_candidate_models", "non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_year_output.rda"))
```

#### Model 8: No fixed effects

```{r model_8, cache = TRUE, include = FALSE}
compile(here::here("R", "04_SDM_model_selection", "04.6_non_cancer_crab_larvae_SDM", "non_cancer_crab_larvae_fixed_effects_candidate_models", "non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_noFE.cpp"))
dyn.load(dynlib(here::here("R", "04_SDM_model_selection", "04.6_non_cancer_crab_larvae_SDM", "non_cancer_crab_larvae_fixed_effects_candidate_models", "non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_noFE")))

non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_noFE_Data = list(
  # number of years
  "n_t" = length(unique(jsoes_bongo_biomass_non_cancer_crab_larvae$year)),
  # weights (all 1)
  "weights_i" = rep(1, length(jsoes_bongo_biomass_non_cancer_crab_larvae$total_sum_of_final_carbon_mg_m3)),
  # temperature data
  # "temp_i" = jsoes_bongo_biomass_non_cancer_crab_larvae$SST_scaled,
  # "temp_gt" = temperature_projection_matrix,
  # distance data
  # "dist_i" = jsoes_bongo_biomass_non_cancer_crab_larvae$dist_shore_scaled,
  # "dist_g" = distance_projection_vector,
  
  # Subyearling Interior Fall Chinook data
  "D_i"= jsoes_bongo_biomass_non_cancer_crab_larvae$total_sum_of_final_carbon_mg_m3, "t_i" = jsoes_bongo_biomass_non_cancer_crab_larvae$year - min(jsoes_bongo_biomass_non_cancer_crab_larvae$year),
  "A_gs"=A_gs_non_cancer_crab_larvae,
  "A_is"=A_is_non_cancer_crab_larvae,
  # "M0_b"=bongo_biomass_spde$c0, "M1_b"=bongo_biomass_spde$g1, "M2_b"=bongo_biomass_spde$g2,
  "spatial_list" = spatial_list_non_cancer_crab_larvae
)


non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_noFE_Params <- list(
  
  ## SDM parameters
  # "beta_t"=rep(0, length(unique(jsoes_bongo_biomass_non_cancer_crab_larvae$year))),
  # "beta_temp" = 0,
  # "beta_dist" = 0,
  "ln_tau_epsilon"=0,
  "ln_tau_omega"=0, 
  "ln_kappa"=0,
  "ln_phi" = 0,
  # "ln_H_input" = c(0, 0),
  "finv_power" = 0,
  
  "logit_rhoE" = 0,
  
  # SDM random effects
  "omega_s"=rnorm(nrow(bongo_biomass_spde$c0)),
  "epsilon_st"=matrix(0, nrow=nrow(bongo_biomass_spde$c0), ncol=non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_noFE_Data$n_t)
  # 
)

non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_noFE_Obj = MakeADFun( data=non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_noFE_Data,
                                           parameters=non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_noFE_Params,
                                           random= c("omega_s", "epsilon_st"),
                                           DLL = "non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_noFE")

# Optimize
non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_noFE_Opt = nlminb( start=non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_noFE_Obj$par, obj=non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_noFE_Obj$fn, grad=non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_noFE_Obj$gr )
# add getJointPrecision for index
non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_noFE_Opt$SD = sdreport( non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_noFE_Obj, bias.correct=TRUE, getJointPrecision = TRUE )
non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_noFE_report = non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_noFE_Obj$report()

non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_noFE_output <- list(non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_noFE_Obj = non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_noFE_Obj,
                                         non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_noFE_Opt = non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_noFE_Opt,
                                         non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_noFE_report = non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_noFE_report)

save(non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_noFE_output,
     file = here::here("R", "04_SDM_model_selection", "04.6_non_cancer_crab_larvae_SDM", "non_cancer_crab_larvae_candidate_models", "non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_noFE_output.rda"))
```

#### Model 9: temperature (smooth spline) + distance from shore (smooth spline)

```{r model_9, cache = TRUE, include = FALSE}
# to get the sdmTMB code to work, you just need to make sure that you provide the smooth terms in a formula (no need to write the complete formula)
sm <- parse_smoothers(formula = "total_sum_of_final_carbon_mg_m3 ~ s(SST_scaled) + s(dist_shore_scaled)", data = as.data.frame(jsoes_bongo_biomass_non_cancer_crab_larvae), knots = NULL)

# get smoother values for predict grid
predict_grid <- data.frame(SST_scaled = as.vector(temperature_projection_matrix),
                           dist_shore_scaled = rep(distance_projection_vector, ncol(temperature_projection_matrix)))

sm_predict <- parse_smoothers(formula = "total_sum_of_final_carbon_mg_m3 ~ s(SST_scaled) + s(dist_shore_scaled)", data = as.data.frame(jsoes_bongo_biomass_non_cancer_crab_larvae), knots = NULL,
                              newdata = predict_grid, basis_prev = sm$basis_out)


# save.image("jsoes_bongo_biomass_non_cancer_crab_larvae_model_selection.RData")
# load("jsoes_bongo_biomass_non_cancer_crab_larvae_model_selection.RData")

compile(here::here("R", "04_SDM_model_selection", "04.6_non_cancer_crab_larvae_SDM", "non_cancer_crab_larvae_fixed_effects_candidate_models",  "non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_stemp_sdist.cpp"))
dyn.load(dynlib(here::here("R", "04_SDM_model_selection", "04.6_non_cancer_crab_larvae_SDM", "non_cancer_crab_larvae_fixed_effects_candidate_models", "non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_stemp_sdist")))

non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_stemp_sdist_Data = list(
  # number of years
  "n_t" = length(unique(jsoes_bongo_biomass_non_cancer_crab_larvae$year)),
  # weights (all 1)
  "weights_i" = rep(1, length(jsoes_bongo_biomass_non_cancer_crab_larvae$total_sum_of_final_carbon_mg_m3)),
  # temperature data
  "temp_i" = jsoes_bongo_biomass_non_cancer_crab_larvae$SST_scaled,
  "temp_gt" = temperature_projection_matrix,
  # distance data
  "dist_i" = jsoes_bongo_biomass_non_cancer_crab_larvae$dist_shore_scaled,
  "dist_g" = distance_projection_vector,
  
  # Subyearling Interior Fall Chinook data
  "D_i"= jsoes_bongo_biomass_non_cancer_crab_larvae$total_sum_of_final_carbon_mg_m3, "t_i" = jsoes_bongo_biomass_non_cancer_crab_larvae$year - min(jsoes_bongo_biomass_non_cancer_crab_larvae$year),
  "A_gs"=A_gs_non_cancer_crab_larvae,
  "A_is"=A_is_non_cancer_crab_larvae,
  # "M0_b"=bongo_biomass_spde$c0, "M1_b"=bongo_biomass_spde$g1, "M2_b"=bongo_biomass_spde$g2,
  "spatial_list" = spatial_list_non_cancer_crab_larvae,
  
  # smooth function data
  "Zs" = sm$Zs, # smoother basis function matrices
  "Xs" = sm$Xs, # smoother linear effect matrix
  "b_smooth_start" = sm$b_smooth_start,
  proj_Zs = sm_predict$Zs,
  proj_Xs = sm_predict$Xs
)

non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_stemp_sdist_Params <- list(
  
  ## SDM parameters
  # "beta_t"=rep(0, length(unique(jsoes_bongo_biomass_non_cancer_crab_larvae$year))),
  # "beta_temp" = 0,
  # "beta_dist" = 0,
  "ln_tau_epsilon"=0,
  "ln_tau_omega"=0, 
  "ln_kappa"=0,
  "ln_phi" = 0,
  # "ln_H_input" = c(0, 0),
  "finv_power" = 0,
  
  "logit_rhoE" = 0,
  
  # SDM random effects
  "omega_s"=rnorm(nrow(bongo_biomass_spde$c0)),
  "epsilon_st"=matrix(0, nrow=nrow(bongo_biomass_spde$c0), ncol=non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_stemp_sdist_Data$n_t),
  
  # smooth functions
  bs = rep(0, ncol(sm$Xs)),
  b_smooth = rep(0, sum(sm$sm_dims)),
  ln_smooth_sigma = rep(0, length(sm$sm_dims))
)

non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_stemp_sdist_Obj = MakeADFun( data=non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_stemp_sdist_Data,
                                                  parameters=non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_stemp_sdist_Params,
                                                  random= c("omega_s", "epsilon_st", "b_smooth"),
                                                  DLL = "non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_stemp_sdist")

# Optimize
non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_stemp_sdist_Opt = nlminb( start=non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_stemp_sdist_Obj$par, obj=non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_stemp_sdist_Obj$fn, grad=non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_stemp_sdist_Obj$gr )
# add getJointPrecision for index
non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_stemp_sdist_Opt$SD = sdreport( non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_stemp_sdist_Obj, bias.correct=TRUE, getJointPrecision = TRUE )
non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_stemp_sdist_report = non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_stemp_sdist_Obj$report()

non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_stemp_sdist_output <- list(non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_stemp_sdist_Obj = non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_stemp_sdist_Obj,
                                                non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_stemp_sdist_Opt = non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_stemp_sdist_Opt,
                                                non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_stemp_sdist_report = non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_stemp_sdist_report)

save(non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_stemp_sdist_output,
     file = here::here("R", "04_SDM_model_selection", "04.6_non_cancer_crab_larvae_SDM", "non_cancer_crab_larvae_fixed_effects_candidate_models", "non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_stemp_sdist_output.rda"))
```

#### Model 10: temperature (linear)

```{r model_10, cache = TRUE, include = FALSE}
compile(here::here("R", "04_SDM_model_selection", "04.6_non_cancer_crab_larvae_SDM", "non_cancer_crab_larvae_fixed_effects_candidate_models", "non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_temp.cpp"))
dyn.load(dynlib(here::here("R", "04_SDM_model_selection", "04.6_non_cancer_crab_larvae_SDM", "non_cancer_crab_larvae_fixed_effects_candidate_models", "non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_temp")))

non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_temp_Data = list(
  # number of years
  "n_t" = length(unique(jsoes_bongo_biomass_non_cancer_crab_larvae$year)),
  # weights (all 1)
  "weights_i" = rep(1, length(jsoes_bongo_biomass_non_cancer_crab_larvae$total_sum_of_final_carbon_mg_m3)),
  # temperature data
  "temp_i" = jsoes_bongo_biomass_non_cancer_crab_larvae$SST_scaled,
  "temp_gt" = temperature_projection_matrix,
  # distance data
  # "dist_i" = jsoes_bongo_biomass_non_cancer_crab_larvae$dist_shore_scaled,
  # "dist_g" = distance_projection_vector,
  
  # Subyearling Interior Fall Chinook data
  "D_i"= jsoes_bongo_biomass_non_cancer_crab_larvae$total_sum_of_final_carbon_mg_m3, "t_i" = jsoes_bongo_biomass_non_cancer_crab_larvae$year - min(jsoes_bongo_biomass_non_cancer_crab_larvae$year),
  "A_gs"=A_gs_non_cancer_crab_larvae,
  "A_is"=A_is_non_cancer_crab_larvae,
  # "M0_b"=bongo_biomass_spde$c0, "M1_b"=bongo_biomass_spde$g1, "M2_b"=bongo_biomass_spde$g2,
  "spatial_list" = spatial_list_non_cancer_crab_larvae
)


non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_temp_Params <- list(
  
  ## SDM parameters
  # "beta_t"=rep(0, length(unique(jsoes_bongo_biomass_non_cancer_crab_larvae$year))),
  "beta_temp" = 0,
  # "beta_dist" = 0,
  "ln_tau_epsilon"=0,
  "ln_tau_omega"=0, 
  "ln_kappa"=0,
  "ln_phi" = 0,
  # "ln_H_input" = c(0, 0),
  "finv_power" = 0,
  
  "logit_rhoE" = 0,
  
  # SDM random effects
  "omega_s"=rnorm(nrow(bongo_biomass_spde$c0)),
  "epsilon_st"=matrix(0, nrow=nrow(bongo_biomass_spde$c0), ncol=non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_temp_Data$n_t)
  # 
)

non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_temp_Obj = MakeADFun( data=non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_temp_Data,
                                           parameters=non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_temp_Params,
                                           random= c("omega_s", "epsilon_st"),
                                           DLL = "non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_temp")

# Optimize
non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_temp_Opt = nlminb( start=non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_temp_Obj$par, obj=non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_temp_Obj$fn, grad=non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_temp_Obj$gr )
# add getJointPrecision for index
non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_temp_Opt$SD = sdreport( non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_temp_Obj, bias.correct=TRUE, getJointPrecision = TRUE )
non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_temp_report = non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_temp_Obj$report()

non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_temp_output <- list(non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_temp_Obj = non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_temp_Obj,
                                         non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_temp_Opt = non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_temp_Opt,
                                         non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_temp_report = non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_temp_report)

save(non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_temp_output,
     file = here::here("R", "04_SDM_model_selection", "04.6_non_cancer_crab_larvae_SDM", "non_cancer_crab_larvae_candidate_models", "non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_temp_output.rda"))
```

#### Model 11: distance from shore (linear)

```{r model_11, cache = TRUE, include = FALSE}
compile(here::here("R", "04_SDM_model_selection", "04.6_non_cancer_crab_larvae_SDM", "non_cancer_crab_larvae_fixed_effects_candidate_models", "non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_dist.cpp"))
dyn.load(dynlib(here::here("R", "04_SDM_model_selection", "04.6_non_cancer_crab_larvae_SDM", "non_cancer_crab_larvae_fixed_effects_candidate_models", "non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_dist")))

non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_dist_Data = list(
  # number of years
  "n_t" = length(unique(jsoes_bongo_biomass_non_cancer_crab_larvae$year)),
  # weights (all 1)
  "weights_i" = rep(1, length(jsoes_bongo_biomass_non_cancer_crab_larvae$total_sum_of_final_carbon_mg_m3)),
  # temperature data
  # "temp_i" = jsoes_bongo_biomass_non_cancer_crab_larvae$SST_scaled,
  # "temp_gt" = temperature_projection_matrix,
  # distance data
  "dist_i" = jsoes_bongo_biomass_non_cancer_crab_larvae$dist_shore_scaled,
  "dist_g" = distance_projection_vector,
  
  # Subyearling Interior Fall Chinook data
  "D_i"= jsoes_bongo_biomass_non_cancer_crab_larvae$total_sum_of_final_carbon_mg_m3, "t_i" = jsoes_bongo_biomass_non_cancer_crab_larvae$year - min(jsoes_bongo_biomass_non_cancer_crab_larvae$year),
  "A_gs"=A_gs_non_cancer_crab_larvae,
  "A_is"=A_is_non_cancer_crab_larvae,
  # "M0_b"=bongo_biomass_spde$c0, "M1_b"=bongo_biomass_spde$g1, "M2_b"=bongo_biomass_spde$g2,
  "spatial_list" = spatial_list_non_cancer_crab_larvae
)


non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_dist_Params <- list(
  
  ## SDM parameters
  # "beta_t"=rep(0, length(unique(jsoes_bongo_biomass_non_cancer_crab_larvae$year))),
  # "beta_temp" = 0,
  "beta_dist" = 0,
  "ln_tau_epsilon"=0,
  "ln_tau_omega"=0, 
  "ln_kappa"=0,
  "ln_phi" = 0,
  # "ln_H_input" = c(0, 0),
  "finv_power" = 0,
  
  "logit_rhoE" = 0,
  
  # SDM random effects
  "omega_s"=rnorm(nrow(bongo_biomass_spde$c0)),
  "epsilon_st"=matrix(0, nrow=nrow(bongo_biomass_spde$c0), ncol=non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_dist_Data$n_t)
  # 
)

non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_dist_Obj = MakeADFun( data=non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_dist_Data,
                                           parameters=non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_dist_Params,
                                           random= c("omega_s", "epsilon_st"),
                                           DLL = "non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_dist")

# Optimize
non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_dist_Opt = nlminb( start=non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_dist_Obj$par, obj=non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_dist_Obj$fn, grad=non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_dist_Obj$gr )
# add getJointPrecision for index
non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_dist_Opt$SD = sdreport( non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_dist_Obj, bias.correct=TRUE, getJointPrecision = TRUE )
non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_dist_report = non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_dist_Obj$report()

non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_dist_output <- list(non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_dist_Obj = non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_dist_Obj,
                                         non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_dist_Opt = non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_dist_Opt,
                                         non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_dist_report = non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_dist_report)

save(non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_dist_output,
     file = here::here("R", "04_SDM_model_selection", "04.6_non_cancer_crab_larvae_SDM", "non_cancer_crab_larvae_candidate_models", "non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_dist_output.rda"))
```

#### Model 12: temperature (smooth spline)

```{r model_12, cache = TRUE, include = FALSE}
# to get the sdmTMB code to work, you just need to make sure that you provide the smooth terms in a formula (no need to write the complete formula)
sm <- parse_smoothers(formula = "total_sum_of_final_carbon_mg_m3 ~ s(SST_scaled)", data = as.data.frame(jsoes_bongo_biomass_non_cancer_crab_larvae), knots = NULL)

# get smoother values for predict grid
predict_grid <- data.frame(SST_scaled = as.vector(temperature_projection_matrix))

sm_predict <- parse_smoothers(formula = "total_sum_of_final_carbon_mg_m3 ~ s(SST_scaled)", data = as.data.frame(jsoes_bongo_biomass_non_cancer_crab_larvae), knots = NULL,
                              newdata = predict_grid, basis_prev = sm$basis_out)

compile(here::here("R", "04_SDM_model_selection", "04.6_non_cancer_crab_larvae_SDM", "non_cancer_crab_larvae_fixed_effects_candidate_models",  "non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_stemp.cpp"))
dyn.load(dynlib(here::here("R", "04_SDM_model_selection", "04.6_non_cancer_crab_larvae_SDM", "non_cancer_crab_larvae_fixed_effects_candidate_models", "non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_stemp")))

non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_stemp_Data = list(
  # number of years
  "n_t" = length(unique(jsoes_bongo_biomass_non_cancer_crab_larvae$year)),
  # weights (all 1)
  "weights_i" = rep(1, length(jsoes_bongo_biomass_non_cancer_crab_larvae$total_sum_of_final_carbon_mg_m3)),
  # temperature data
  "temp_i" = jsoes_bongo_biomass_non_cancer_crab_larvae$SST_scaled,
  "temp_gt" = temperature_projection_matrix,
  # distance data
  # "dist_i" = jsoes_bongo_biomass_non_cancer_crab_larvae$dist_shore_scaled,
  # "dist_g" = distance_projection_vector,
  
  # Subyearling Interior Fall Chinook data
  "D_i"= jsoes_bongo_biomass_non_cancer_crab_larvae$total_sum_of_final_carbon_mg_m3, "t_i" = jsoes_bongo_biomass_non_cancer_crab_larvae$year - min(jsoes_bongo_biomass_non_cancer_crab_larvae$year),
  "A_gs"=A_gs_non_cancer_crab_larvae,
  "A_is"=A_is_non_cancer_crab_larvae,
  # "M0_b"=bongo_biomass_spde$c0, "M1_b"=bongo_biomass_spde$g1, "M2_b"=bongo_biomass_spde$g2,
  "spatial_list" = spatial_list_non_cancer_crab_larvae,
  
  # smooth function data
  "Zs" = sm$Zs, # smoother basis function matrices
  "Xs" = sm$Xs, # smoother linear effect matrix
  "b_smooth_start" = sm$b_smooth_start,
  proj_Zs = sm_predict$Zs,
  proj_Xs = sm_predict$Xs
)

non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_stemp_Params <- list(
  
  ## SDM parameters
  # "beta_t"=rep(0, length(unique(jsoes_bongo_biomass_non_cancer_crab_larvae$year))),
  # "beta_temp" = 0,
  # "beta_dist" = 0,
  "ln_tau_epsilon"=0,
  "ln_tau_omega"=0, 
  "ln_kappa"=0,
  "ln_phi" = 0,
  # "ln_H_input" = c(0, 0),
  "finv_power" = 0,
  
  "logit_rhoE" = 0,
  
  # SDM random effects
  "omega_s"=rnorm(nrow(bongo_biomass_spde$c0)),
  "epsilon_st"=matrix(0, nrow=nrow(bongo_biomass_spde$c0), ncol=non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_stemp_Data$n_t),
  
  # smooth functions
  bs = rep(0, ncol(sm$Xs)),
  b_smooth = rep(0, sum(sm$sm_dims)),
  ln_smooth_sigma = rep(0, length(sm$sm_dims))
)

non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_stemp_Obj = MakeADFun( data=non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_stemp_Data,
                                            parameters=non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_stemp_Params,
                                            random= c("omega_s", "epsilon_st", "b_smooth"),
                                            DLL = "non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_stemp")

# Optimize
non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_stemp_Opt = nlminb( start=non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_stemp_Obj$par, obj=non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_stemp_Obj$fn, grad=non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_stemp_Obj$gr )
# add getJointPrecision for index
non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_stemp_Opt$SD = sdreport( non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_stemp_Obj, bias.correct=TRUE, getJointPrecision = TRUE )
non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_stemp_report = non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_stemp_Obj$report()

non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_stemp_output <- list(non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_stemp_Obj = non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_stemp_Obj,
                                          non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_stemp_Opt = non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_stemp_Opt,
                                          non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_stemp_report = non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_stemp_report)

save(non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_stemp_output,
     file = here::here("R", "04_SDM_model_selection", "04.6_non_cancer_crab_larvae_SDM", "non_cancer_crab_larvae_fixed_effects_candidate_models", "non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_stemp_output.rda"))
```

#### Model 13: s(dist)

```{r model_13, cache = TRUE, include = FALSE}
# to get the sdmTMB code to work, you just need to make sure that you provide the smooth terms in a formula (no need to write the complete formula)
sm <- parse_smoothers(formula = "total_sum_of_final_carbon_mg_m3 ~ s(dist_shore_scaled)", data = as.data.frame(jsoes_bongo_biomass_non_cancer_crab_larvae), knots = NULL)

# get smoother values for predict grid
predict_grid <- data.frame(
  dist_shore_scaled = rep(distance_projection_vector, ncol(temperature_projection_matrix)))

sm_predict <- parse_smoothers(formula = "total_sum_of_final_carbon_mg_m3 ~ s(dist_shore_scaled)", data = as.data.frame(jsoes_bongo_biomass_non_cancer_crab_larvae), knots = NULL,
                              newdata = predict_grid, basis_prev = sm$basis_out)


# save.image("jsoes_bongo_biomass_non_cancer_crab_larvae_model_selection.RData")
# load("jsoes_bongo_biomass_non_cancer_crab_larvae_model_selection.RData")

compile(here::here("R", "04_SDM_model_selection", "04.6_non_cancer_crab_larvae_SDM", "non_cancer_crab_larvae_fixed_effects_candidate_models",  "non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_sdist.cpp"))
dyn.load(dynlib(here::here("R", "04_SDM_model_selection", "04.6_non_cancer_crab_larvae_SDM", "non_cancer_crab_larvae_fixed_effects_candidate_models", "non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_sdist")))

non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_sdist_Data = list(
  # number of years
  "n_t" = length(unique(jsoes_bongo_biomass_non_cancer_crab_larvae$year)),
  # weights (all 1)
  "weights_i" = rep(1, length(jsoes_bongo_biomass_non_cancer_crab_larvae$total_sum_of_final_carbon_mg_m3)),
  # temperature data
  # "temp_i" = jsoes_bongo_biomass_non_cancer_crab_larvae$SST_scaled,
  # "temp_gt" = temperature_projection_matrix,
  # distance data
  "dist_i" = jsoes_bongo_biomass_non_cancer_crab_larvae$dist_shore_scaled,
  "dist_g" = distance_projection_vector,
  
  # Subyearling Interior Fall Chinook data
  "D_i"= jsoes_bongo_biomass_non_cancer_crab_larvae$total_sum_of_final_carbon_mg_m3, "t_i" = jsoes_bongo_biomass_non_cancer_crab_larvae$year - min(jsoes_bongo_biomass_non_cancer_crab_larvae$year),
  "A_gs"=A_gs_non_cancer_crab_larvae,
  "A_is"=A_is_non_cancer_crab_larvae,
  # "M0_b"=bongo_biomass_spde$c0, "M1_b"=bongo_biomass_spde$g1, "M2_b"=bongo_biomass_spde$g2,
  "spatial_list" = spatial_list_non_cancer_crab_larvae,
  
  # smooth function data
  "Zs" = sm$Zs, # smoother basis function matrices
  "Xs" = sm$Xs, # smoother linear effect matrix
  "b_smooth_start" = sm$b_smooth_start,
  proj_Zs = sm_predict$Zs,
  proj_Xs = sm_predict$Xs
)

non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_sdist_Params <- list(
  
  ## SDM parameters
  # "beta_t"=rep(0, length(unique(jsoes_bongo_biomass_non_cancer_crab_larvae$year))),
  # "beta_temp" = 0,
  # "beta_dist" = 0,
  "ln_tau_epsilon"=0,
  "ln_tau_omega"=0, 
  "ln_kappa"=0,
  "ln_phi" = 0,
  # "ln_H_input" = c(0, 0),
  "finv_power" = 0,
  
  "logit_rhoE" = 0,
  
  # SDM random effects
  "omega_s"=rnorm(nrow(bongo_biomass_spde$c0)),
  "epsilon_st"=matrix(0, nrow=nrow(bongo_biomass_spde$c0), ncol=non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_sdist_Data$n_t),
  
  # smooth functions
  bs = rep(0, ncol(sm$Xs)),
  b_smooth = rep(0, sum(sm$sm_dims)),
  ln_smooth_sigma = rep(0, length(sm$sm_dims))
)

non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_sdist_Obj = MakeADFun( data=non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_sdist_Data,
                                            parameters=non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_sdist_Params,
                                            random= c("omega_s", "epsilon_st", "b_smooth"),
                                            DLL = "non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_sdist")

# Optimize
non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_sdist_Opt = nlminb( start=non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_sdist_Obj$par, obj=non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_sdist_Obj$fn, grad=non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_sdist_Obj$gr )
# add getJointPrecision for index
non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_sdist_Opt$SD = sdreport( non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_sdist_Obj, bias.correct=TRUE, getJointPrecision = TRUE )
non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_sdist_report = non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_sdist_Obj$report()

non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_sdist_output <- list(non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_sdist_Obj = non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_sdist_Obj,
                                          non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_sdist_Opt = non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_sdist_Opt,
                                          non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_sdist_report = non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_sdist_report)

save(non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_sdist_output,
     file = here::here("R", "04_SDM_model_selection", "04.6_non_cancer_crab_larvae_SDM", "non_cancer_crab_larvae_fixed_effects_candidate_models", "non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_sdist_output.rda"))
```

#### Model 14: temperature (linear) + distance from shore (linear)

```{r model_14, cache = TRUE, include = FALSE}
compile(here::here("R", "04_SDM_model_selection", "04.6_non_cancer_crab_larvae_SDM", "non_cancer_crab_larvae_fixed_effects_candidate_models", "non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_temp_dist.cpp"))
dyn.load(dynlib(here::here("R", "04_SDM_model_selection", "04.6_non_cancer_crab_larvae_SDM", "non_cancer_crab_larvae_fixed_effects_candidate_models", "non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_temp_dist")))

non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_temp_dist_Data = list(
  # number of years
  "n_t" = length(unique(jsoes_bongo_biomass_non_cancer_crab_larvae$year)),
  # weights (all 1)
  "weights_i" = rep(1, length(jsoes_bongo_biomass_non_cancer_crab_larvae$total_sum_of_final_carbon_mg_m3)),
  # temperature data
  "temp_i" = jsoes_bongo_biomass_non_cancer_crab_larvae$SST_scaled,
  "temp_gt" = temperature_projection_matrix,
  # distance data
  "dist_i" = jsoes_bongo_biomass_non_cancer_crab_larvae$dist_shore_scaled,
  "dist_g" = distance_projection_vector,
  
  # Subyearling Interior Fall Chinook data
  "D_i"= jsoes_bongo_biomass_non_cancer_crab_larvae$total_sum_of_final_carbon_mg_m3, "t_i" = jsoes_bongo_biomass_non_cancer_crab_larvae$year - min(jsoes_bongo_biomass_non_cancer_crab_larvae$year),
  "A_gs"=A_gs_non_cancer_crab_larvae,
  "A_is"=A_is_non_cancer_crab_larvae,
  # "M0_b"=bongo_biomass_spde$c0, "M1_b"=bongo_biomass_spde$g1, "M2_b"=bongo_biomass_spde$g2,
  "spatial_list" = spatial_list_non_cancer_crab_larvae
)


non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_temp_dist_Params <- list(
  
  ## SDM parameters
  # "beta_t"=rep(0, length(unique(jsoes_bongo_biomass_non_cancer_crab_larvae$year))),
  "beta_temp" = 0,
  "beta_dist" = 0,
  "ln_tau_epsilon"=0,
  "ln_tau_omega"=0, 
  "ln_kappa"=0,
  "ln_phi" = 0,
  # "ln_H_input" = c(0, 0),
  "finv_power" = 0,
  
  "logit_rhoE" = 0,
  
  # SDM random effects
  "omega_s"=rnorm(nrow(bongo_biomass_spde$c0)),
  "epsilon_st"=matrix(0, nrow=nrow(bongo_biomass_spde$c0), ncol=non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_temp_dist_Data$n_t)
  # 
)

non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_temp_dist_Obj = MakeADFun( data=non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_temp_dist_Data,
                                                            parameters=non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_temp_dist_Params,
                                                            random= c("omega_s", "epsilon_st"),
                                                            DLL = "non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_temp_dist")

# Optimize
non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_temp_dist_Opt = nlminb( start=non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_temp_dist_Obj$par, obj=non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_temp_dist_Obj$fn, grad=non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_temp_dist_Obj$gr )
# add getJointPrecision for index
non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_temp_dist_Opt$SD = sdreport( non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_temp_dist_Obj, bias.correct=TRUE, getJointPrecision = TRUE )
non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_temp_dist_report = non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_temp_dist_Obj$report()

non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_temp_dist_output <- list(non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_temp_dist_Obj = non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_temp_dist_Obj,
                                                          non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_temp_dist_Opt = non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_temp_dist_Opt,
                                                          non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_temp_dist_report = non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_temp_dist_report)

save(non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_temp_dist_output,
     file = here::here("R", "04_SDM_model_selection", "04.6_non_cancer_crab_larvae_SDM", "non_cancer_crab_larvae_candidate_models", "non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_temp_dist_output.rda"))
```

#### Model 15: Year (factor) + temperature (smooth spline) + distance from shore (linear)

```{r model_15, cache = TRUE, include = FALSE}
# to get the sdmTMB code to work, you just need to make sure that you provide the smooth terms in a formula (no need to write the complete formula)
sm <- parse_smoothers(formula = "total_sum_of_final_carbon_mg_m3 ~ s(SST_scaled)", data = as.data.frame(jsoes_bongo_biomass_non_cancer_crab_larvae), knots = NULL)

# get smoother values for predict grid
predict_grid <- data.frame(SST_scaled = as.vector(temperature_projection_matrix),
                           dist_shore_scaled = rep(distance_projection_vector, ncol(temperature_projection_matrix)))

sm_predict <- parse_smoothers(formula = "total_sum_of_final_carbon_mg_m3 ~ s(SST_scaled)", data = as.data.frame(jsoes_bongo_biomass_non_cancer_crab_larvae), knots = NULL,
                              newdata = predict_grid, basis_prev = sm$basis_out)


# save.image("jsoes_bongo_biomass_non_cancer_crab_larvae_model_selection.RData")
# load("jsoes_bongo_biomass_non_cancer_crab_larvae_model_selection.RData")

compile(here::here("R", "04_SDM_model_selection", "04.6_non_cancer_crab_larvae_SDM", "non_cancer_crab_larvae_fixed_effects_candidate_models",  "non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_stemp_dist_year.cpp"))
dyn.load(dynlib(here::here("R", "04_SDM_model_selection", "04.6_non_cancer_crab_larvae_SDM", "non_cancer_crab_larvae_fixed_effects_candidate_models", "non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_stemp_dist_year")))

non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_stemp_dist_year_Data = list(
  # number of years
  "n_t" = length(unique(jsoes_bongo_biomass_non_cancer_crab_larvae$year)),
  # weights (all 1)
  "weights_i" = rep(1, length(jsoes_bongo_biomass_non_cancer_crab_larvae$total_sum_of_final_carbon_mg_m3)),
  # temperature data
  "temp_i" = jsoes_bongo_biomass_non_cancer_crab_larvae$SST_scaled,
  "temp_gt" = temperature_projection_matrix,
  # distance data
  "dist_i" = jsoes_bongo_biomass_non_cancer_crab_larvae$dist_shore_scaled,
  "dist_g" = distance_projection_vector,
  
  # Subyearling Interior Fall Chinook data
  "D_i"= jsoes_bongo_biomass_non_cancer_crab_larvae$total_sum_of_final_carbon_mg_m3, "t_i" = jsoes_bongo_biomass_non_cancer_crab_larvae$year - min(jsoes_bongo_biomass_non_cancer_crab_larvae$year),
  "A_gs"=A_gs_non_cancer_crab_larvae,
  "A_is"=A_is_non_cancer_crab_larvae,
  # "M0_b"=bongo_biomass_spde$c0, "M1_b"=bongo_biomass_spde$g1, "M2_b"=bongo_biomass_spde$g2,
  "spatial_list" = spatial_list_non_cancer_crab_larvae,
  
  # smooth function data
  "Zs" = sm$Zs, # smoother basis function matrices
  "Xs" = sm$Xs, # smoother linear effect matrix
  "b_smooth_start" = sm$b_smooth_start,
  proj_Zs = sm_predict$Zs,
  proj_Xs = sm_predict$Xs
)

non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_stemp_dist_year_Params <- list(
  
  ## SDM parameters
  "beta_t"=rep(0, length(unique(jsoes_bongo_biomass_non_cancer_crab_larvae$year))),
  # "beta_temp" = 0,
  "beta_dist" = 0,
  "ln_tau_epsilon"=0,
  "ln_tau_omega"=0, 
  "ln_kappa"=0,
  "ln_phi" = 0,
  # "ln_H_input" = c(0, 0),
  "finv_power" = 0,
  
  "logit_rhoE" = 0,
  
  # SDM random effects
  "omega_s"=rnorm(nrow(bongo_biomass_spde$c0)),
  "epsilon_st"=matrix(0, nrow=nrow(bongo_biomass_spde$c0), ncol=non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_stemp_dist_year_Data$n_t),
  
  # smooth functions
  bs = rep(0, ncol(sm$Xs)),
  b_smooth = rep(0, sum(sm$sm_dims)),
  ln_smooth_sigma = rep(0, length(sm$sm_dims))
)

non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_stemp_dist_year_Obj = MakeADFun( data=non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_stemp_dist_year_Data,
                                                  parameters=non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_stemp_dist_year_Params,
                                                  random= c("omega_s", "epsilon_st", "b_smooth"),
                                                  DLL = "non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_stemp_dist_year")

# Optimize
non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_stemp_dist_year_Opt = nlminb( start=non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_stemp_dist_year_Obj$par, obj=non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_stemp_dist_year_Obj$fn, grad=non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_stemp_dist_year_Obj$gr )
# add getJointPrecision for index
non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_stemp_dist_year_Opt$SD = sdreport( non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_stemp_dist_year_Obj, bias.correct=TRUE, getJointPrecision = TRUE )
non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_stemp_dist_year_report = non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_stemp_dist_year_Obj$report()

non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_stemp_dist_year_output <- list(non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_stemp_dist_year_Obj = non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_stemp_dist_year_Obj,
                                                non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_stemp_dist_year_Opt = non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_stemp_dist_year_Opt,
                                                non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_stemp_dist_year_report = non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_stemp_dist_year_report)

save(non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_stemp_dist_year_output,
     file = here::here("R", "04_SDM_model_selection", "04.6_non_cancer_crab_larvae_SDM", "non_cancer_crab_larvae_fixed_effects_candidate_models", "non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_stemp_dist_year_output.rda"))
```

#### Model 16: Year (factor) + temperature (linear) + distance from shore (smooth spline)

```{r model_16, cache = TRUE, include = FALSE}
# to get the sdmTMB code to work, you just need to make sure that you provide the smooth terms in a formula (no need to write the complete formula)
sm <- parse_smoothers(formula = "total_sum_of_final_carbon_mg_m3 ~ s(dist_shore_scaled)", data = as.data.frame(jsoes_bongo_biomass_non_cancer_crab_larvae), knots = NULL)

# get smoother values for predict grid
predict_grid <- data.frame(SST_scaled = as.vector(temperature_projection_matrix),
                           dist_shore_scaled = rep(distance_projection_vector, ncol(temperature_projection_matrix)))

sm_predict <- parse_smoothers(formula = "total_sum_of_final_carbon_mg_m3 ~ s(dist_shore_scaled)", data = as.data.frame(jsoes_bongo_biomass_non_cancer_crab_larvae), knots = NULL,
                              newdata = predict_grid, basis_prev = sm$basis_out)


# save.image("jsoes_bongo_biomass_non_cancer_crab_larvae_model_selection.RData")
# load("jsoes_bongo_biomass_non_cancer_crab_larvae_model_selection.RData")

compile(here::here("R", "04_SDM_model_selection", "04.6_non_cancer_crab_larvae_SDM", "non_cancer_crab_larvae_fixed_effects_candidate_models",  "non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_temp_sdist_year_1.cpp"))
dyn.load(dynlib(here::here("R", "04_SDM_model_selection", "04.6_non_cancer_crab_larvae_SDM", "non_cancer_crab_larvae_fixed_effects_candidate_models", "non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_temp_sdist_year_1")))

non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_temp_sdist_year_1_Data = list(
  # number of years
  "n_t" = length(unique(jsoes_bongo_biomass_non_cancer_crab_larvae$year)),
  # weights (all 1)
  "weights_i" = rep(1, length(jsoes_bongo_biomass_non_cancer_crab_larvae$total_sum_of_final_carbon_mg_m3)),
  # temperature data
  "temp_i" = jsoes_bongo_biomass_non_cancer_crab_larvae$SST_scaled,
  "temp_gt" = temperature_projection_matrix,
  # distance data
  "dist_i" = jsoes_bongo_biomass_non_cancer_crab_larvae$dist_shore_scaled,
  "dist_g" = distance_projection_vector,
  
  # Subyearling Interior Fall Chinook data
  "D_i"= jsoes_bongo_biomass_non_cancer_crab_larvae$total_sum_of_final_carbon_mg_m3, "t_i" = jsoes_bongo_biomass_non_cancer_crab_larvae$year - min(jsoes_bongo_biomass_non_cancer_crab_larvae$year),
  "A_gs"=A_gs_non_cancer_crab_larvae,
  "A_is"=A_is_non_cancer_crab_larvae,
  # "M0_b"=bongo_biomass_spde$c0, "M1_b"=bongo_biomass_spde$g1, "M2_b"=bongo_biomass_spde$g2,
  "spatial_list" = spatial_list_non_cancer_crab_larvae,
  
  # smooth function data
  "Zs" = sm$Zs, # smoother basis function matrices
  "Xs" = sm$Xs, # smoother linear effect matrix
  "b_smooth_start" = sm$b_smooth_start,
  proj_Zs = sm_predict$Zs,
  proj_Xs = sm_predict$Xs
)

non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_temp_sdist_year_1_Params <- list(
  
  ## SDM parameters
  "beta_t"=rep(0, length(unique(jsoes_bongo_biomass_non_cancer_crab_larvae$year))),
  "beta_temp" = 0,
  # "beta_dist" = 0,
  "ln_tau_epsilon"=0,
  "ln_tau_omega"=0, 
  "ln_kappa"=0,
  "ln_phi" = 0,
  # "ln_H_input" = c(0, 0),
  "finv_power" = 0,
  
  "logit_rhoE" = 0,
  
  # SDM random effects
  "omega_s"=rnorm(nrow(bongo_biomass_spde$c0)),
  "epsilon_st"=matrix(0, nrow=nrow(bongo_biomass_spde$c0), ncol=non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_temp_sdist_year_1_Data$n_t),
  
  # smooth functions
  bs = rep(0, ncol(sm$Xs)),
  b_smooth = rep(0, sum(sm$sm_dims)),
  ln_smooth_sigma = rep(0, length(sm$sm_dims))
)

non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_temp_sdist_year_1_Obj = MakeADFun( data=non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_temp_sdist_year_1_Data,
                                                 parameters=non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_temp_sdist_year_1_Params,
                                                 random= c("omega_s", "epsilon_st", "b_smooth"),
                                                 DLL = "non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_temp_sdist_year_1")

# Optimize
non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_temp_sdist_year_1_Opt = nlminb( start=non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_temp_sdist_year_1_Obj$par, obj=non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_temp_sdist_year_1_Obj$fn, grad=non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_temp_sdist_year_1_Obj$gr )
# add getJointPrecision for index
non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_temp_sdist_year_1_Opt$SD = sdreport( non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_temp_sdist_year_1_Obj, bias.correct=TRUE, getJointPrecision = TRUE )
non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_temp_sdist_year_1_report = non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_temp_sdist_year_1_Obj$report()

non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_temp_sdist_year_1_output <- list(non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_temp_sdist_year_1_Obj = non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_temp_sdist_year_1_Obj,
                                               non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_temp_sdist_year_1_Opt = non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_temp_sdist_year_1_Opt,
                                               non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_temp_sdist_year_1_report = non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_temp_sdist_year_1_report)

save(non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_temp_sdist_year_1_output,
     file = here::here("R", "04_SDM_model_selection", "04.6_non_cancer_crab_larvae_SDM", "non_cancer_crab_larvae_fixed_effects_candidate_models", "non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_temp_sdist_year_1_output.rda"))
```

#### Model 17: temperature (smooth spline) + distance from shore (linear)

```{r model_17, cache = TRUE, include = FALSE}
# to get the sdmTMB code to work, you just need to make sure that you provide the smooth terms in a formula (no need to write the complete formula)
sm <- parse_smoothers(formula = "total_sum_of_final_carbon_mg_m3 ~ s(SST_scaled)", data = as.data.frame(jsoes_bongo_biomass_non_cancer_crab_larvae), knots = NULL)

# get smoother values for predict grid
predict_grid <- data.frame(SST_scaled = as.vector(temperature_projection_matrix),
                           dist_shore_scaled = rep(distance_projection_vector, ncol(temperature_projection_matrix)))

sm_predict <- parse_smoothers(formula = "total_sum_of_final_carbon_mg_m3 ~ s(SST_scaled)", data = as.data.frame(jsoes_bongo_biomass_non_cancer_crab_larvae), knots = NULL,
                              newdata = predict_grid, basis_prev = sm$basis_out)


# save.image("jsoes_bongo_biomass_non_cancer_crab_larvae_model_selection.RData")
# load("jsoes_bongo_biomass_non_cancer_crab_larvae_model_selection.RData")

compile(here::here("R", "04_SDM_model_selection", "04.6_non_cancer_crab_larvae_SDM", "non_cancer_crab_larvae_fixed_effects_candidate_models",  "non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_stemp_dist.cpp"))
dyn.load(dynlib(here::here("R", "04_SDM_model_selection", "04.6_non_cancer_crab_larvae_SDM", "non_cancer_crab_larvae_fixed_effects_candidate_models", "non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_stemp_dist")))

non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_stemp_dist_Data = list(
  # number of years
  "n_t" = length(unique(jsoes_bongo_biomass_non_cancer_crab_larvae$year)),
  # weights (all 1)
  "weights_i" = rep(1, length(jsoes_bongo_biomass_non_cancer_crab_larvae$total_sum_of_final_carbon_mg_m3)),
  # temperature data
  "temp_i" = jsoes_bongo_biomass_non_cancer_crab_larvae$SST_scaled,
  "temp_gt" = temperature_projection_matrix,
  # distance data
  "dist_i" = jsoes_bongo_biomass_non_cancer_crab_larvae$dist_shore_scaled,
  "dist_g" = distance_projection_vector,
  
  # Subyearling Interior Fall Chinook data
  "D_i"= jsoes_bongo_biomass_non_cancer_crab_larvae$total_sum_of_final_carbon_mg_m3, "t_i" = jsoes_bongo_biomass_non_cancer_crab_larvae$year - min(jsoes_bongo_biomass_non_cancer_crab_larvae$year),
  "A_gs"=A_gs_non_cancer_crab_larvae,
  "A_is"=A_is_non_cancer_crab_larvae,
  # "M0_b"=bongo_biomass_spde$c0, "M1_b"=bongo_biomass_spde$g1, "M2_b"=bongo_biomass_spde$g2,
  "spatial_list" = spatial_list_non_cancer_crab_larvae,
  
  # smooth function data
  "Zs" = sm$Zs, # smoother basis function matrices
  "Xs" = sm$Xs, # smoother linear effect matrix
  "b_smooth_start" = sm$b_smooth_start,
  proj_Zs = sm_predict$Zs,
  proj_Xs = sm_predict$Xs
)

non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_stemp_dist_Params <- list(
  
  ## SDM parameters
  # "beta_t"=rep(0, length(unique(jsoes_bongo_biomass_non_cancer_crab_larvae$year))),
  # "beta_temp" = 0,
  "beta_dist" = 0,
  "ln_tau_epsilon"=0,
  "ln_tau_omega"=0, 
  "ln_kappa"=0,
  "ln_phi" = 0,
  # "ln_H_input" = c(0, 0),
  "finv_power" = 0,
  
  "logit_rhoE" = 0,
  
  # SDM random effects
  "omega_s"=rnorm(nrow(bongo_biomass_spde$c0)),
  "epsilon_st"=matrix(0, nrow=nrow(bongo_biomass_spde$c0), ncol=non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_stemp_dist_Data$n_t),
  
  # smooth functions
  bs = rep(0, ncol(sm$Xs)),
  b_smooth = rep(0, sum(sm$sm_dims)),
  ln_smooth_sigma = rep(0, length(sm$sm_dims))
)

non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_stemp_dist_Obj = MakeADFun( data=non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_stemp_dist_Data,
                                             parameters=non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_stemp_dist_Params,
                                             random= c("omega_s", "epsilon_st", "b_smooth"),
                                             DLL = "non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_stemp_dist")

# Optimize
non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_stemp_dist_Opt = nlminb( start=non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_stemp_dist_Obj$par, obj=non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_stemp_dist_Obj$fn, grad=non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_stemp_dist_Obj$gr )
# add getJointPrecision for index
non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_stemp_dist_Opt$SD = sdreport( non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_stemp_dist_Obj, bias.correct=TRUE, getJointPrecision = TRUE )
non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_stemp_dist_report = non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_stemp_dist_Obj$report()

non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_stemp_dist_output <- list(non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_stemp_dist_Obj = non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_stemp_dist_Obj,
                                           non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_stemp_dist_Opt = non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_stemp_dist_Opt,
                                           non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_stemp_dist_report = non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_stemp_dist_report)

save(non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_stemp_dist_output,
     file = here::here("R", "04_SDM_model_selection", "04.6_non_cancer_crab_larvae_SDM", "non_cancer_crab_larvae_fixed_effects_candidate_models", "non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_stemp_dist_output.rda"))
```

#### Model 18: temperature (linear) + distance from shore (smooth spline)

```{r model_18, cache = TRUE, include = FALSE}
# to get the sdmTMB code to work, you just need to make sure that you provide the smooth terms in a formula (no need to write the complete formula)
sm <- parse_smoothers(formula = "total_sum_of_final_carbon_mg_m3 ~ s(dist_shore_scaled)", data = as.data.frame(jsoes_bongo_biomass_non_cancer_crab_larvae), knots = NULL)

# get smoother values for predict grid
predict_grid <- data.frame(SST_scaled = as.vector(temperature_projection_matrix),
                           dist_shore_scaled = rep(distance_projection_vector, ncol(temperature_projection_matrix)))

sm_predict <- parse_smoothers(formula = "total_sum_of_final_carbon_mg_m3 ~ s(dist_shore_scaled)", data = as.data.frame(jsoes_bongo_biomass_non_cancer_crab_larvae), knots = NULL,
                              newdata = predict_grid, basis_prev = sm$basis_out)


# save.image("jsoes_bongo_biomass_non_cancer_crab_larvae_model_selection.RData")
# load("jsoes_bongo_biomass_non_cancer_crab_larvae_model_selection.RData")

compile(here::here("R", "04_SDM_model_selection", "04.6_non_cancer_crab_larvae_SDM", "non_cancer_crab_larvae_fixed_effects_candidate_models",  "non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_temp_sdist.cpp"))
dyn.load(dynlib(here::here("R", "04_SDM_model_selection", "04.6_non_cancer_crab_larvae_SDM", "non_cancer_crab_larvae_fixed_effects_candidate_models", "non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_temp_sdist")))

non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_temp_sdist_Data = list(
  # number of years
  "n_t" = length(unique(jsoes_bongo_biomass_non_cancer_crab_larvae$year)),
  # weights (all 1)
  "weights_i" = rep(1, length(jsoes_bongo_biomass_non_cancer_crab_larvae$total_sum_of_final_carbon_mg_m3)),
  # temperature data
  "temp_i" = jsoes_bongo_biomass_non_cancer_crab_larvae$SST_scaled,
  "temp_gt" = temperature_projection_matrix,
  # distance data
  "dist_i" = jsoes_bongo_biomass_non_cancer_crab_larvae$dist_shore_scaled,
  "dist_g" = distance_projection_vector,
  
  # Subyearling Interior Fall Chinook data
  "D_i"= jsoes_bongo_biomass_non_cancer_crab_larvae$total_sum_of_final_carbon_mg_m3, "t_i" = jsoes_bongo_biomass_non_cancer_crab_larvae$year - min(jsoes_bongo_biomass_non_cancer_crab_larvae$year),
  "A_gs"=A_gs_non_cancer_crab_larvae,
  "A_is"=A_is_non_cancer_crab_larvae,
  # "M0_b"=bongo_biomass_spde$c0, "M1_b"=bongo_biomass_spde$g1, "M2_b"=bongo_biomass_spde$g2,
  "spatial_list" = spatial_list_non_cancer_crab_larvae,
  
  # smooth function data
  "Zs" = sm$Zs, # smoother basis function matrices
  "Xs" = sm$Xs, # smoother linear effect matrix
  "b_smooth_start" = sm$b_smooth_start,
  proj_Zs = sm_predict$Zs,
  proj_Xs = sm_predict$Xs
)

non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_temp_sdist_Params <- list(
  
  ## SDM parameters
  # "beta_t"=rep(0, length(unique(jsoes_bongo_biomass_non_cancer_crab_larvae$year))),
  "beta_temp" = 0,
  # "beta_dist" = 0,
  "ln_tau_epsilon"=0,
  "ln_tau_omega"=0, 
  "ln_kappa"=0,
  "ln_phi" = 0,
  # "ln_H_input" = c(0, 0),
  "finv_power" = 0,
  
  "logit_rhoE" = 0,
  
  # SDM random effects
  "omega_s"=rnorm(nrow(bongo_biomass_spde$c0)),
  "epsilon_st"=matrix(0, nrow=nrow(bongo_biomass_spde$c0), ncol=non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_temp_sdist_Data$n_t),
  
  # smooth functions
  bs = rep(0, ncol(sm$Xs)),
  b_smooth = rep(0, sum(sm$sm_dims)),
  ln_smooth_sigma = rep(0, length(sm$sm_dims))
)

non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_temp_sdist_Obj = MakeADFun( data=non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_temp_sdist_Data,
                                             parameters=non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_temp_sdist_Params,
                                             random= c("omega_s", "epsilon_st", "b_smooth"),
                                             DLL = "non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_temp_sdist")

# Optimize
non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_temp_sdist_Opt = nlminb( start=non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_temp_sdist_Obj$par, obj=non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_temp_sdist_Obj$fn, grad=non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_temp_sdist_Obj$gr )
# add getJointPrecision for index
non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_temp_sdist_Opt$SD = sdreport( non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_temp_sdist_Obj, bias.correct=TRUE, getJointPrecision = TRUE )
non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_temp_sdist_report = non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_temp_sdist_Obj$report()

non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_temp_sdist_output <- list(non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_temp_sdist_Obj = non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_temp_sdist_Obj,
                                           non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_temp_sdist_Opt = non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_temp_sdist_Opt,
                                           non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_temp_sdist_report = non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_temp_sdist_report)

save(non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_temp_sdist_output,
     file = here::here("R", "04_SDM_model_selection", "04.6_non_cancer_crab_larvae_SDM", "non_cancer_crab_larvae_fixed_effects_candidate_models", "non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_temp_sdist_output.rda"))
```



### Compare candidate models

```{r, cache = TRUE, include = FALSE}
non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_stemp_dist_year_cAIC <- cAIC(model_data = non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_stemp_dist_year_Data,
                                              model_obj = non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_stemp_dist_year_Obj,  
                                              model_parameters = non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_stemp_dist_year_Params,
                                              random = c("omega_s", "epsilon_st", "b_smooth"),
                                              DLL = "non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_stemp_dist_year",
                                              data_observation_names = "D_i")

non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_stemp_dist_year_AIC <- 2*non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_stemp_dist_year_Opt$objective + 2 * length(non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_stemp_dist_year_Opt$par)

non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_temp_sdist_year_1_cAIC <- cAIC(model_data = non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_temp_sdist_year_1_Data,
                                              model_obj = non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_temp_sdist_year_1_Obj,  
                                              model_parameters = non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_temp_sdist_year_1_Params,
                                              random = c("omega_s", "epsilon_st", "b_smooth"),
                                              DLL = "non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_temp_sdist_year_1",
                                              data_observation_names = "D_i")

non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_temp_sdist_year_1_AIC <- 2*non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_temp_sdist_year_1_Opt$objective + 2 * length(non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_temp_sdist_year_1_Opt$par)

non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_temp_sdist_cAIC <- cAIC(model_data = non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_temp_sdist_Data,
                                              model_obj = non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_temp_sdist_Obj,  
                                              model_parameters = non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_temp_sdist_Params,
                                              random = c("omega_s", "epsilon_st", "b_smooth"),
                                              DLL = "non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_temp_sdist",
                                              data_observation_names = "D_i")

non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_temp_sdist_AIC <- 2*non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_temp_sdist_Opt$objective + 2 * length(non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_temp_sdist_Opt$par)

non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_stemp_dist_cAIC <- cAIC(model_data = non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_stemp_dist_Data,
                                              model_obj = non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_stemp_dist_Obj,  
                                              model_parameters = non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_stemp_dist_Params,
                                              random = c("omega_s", "epsilon_st", "b_smooth"),
                                              DLL = "non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_stemp_dist",
                                              data_observation_names = "D_i")

non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_stemp_dist_AIC <- 2*non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_stemp_dist_Opt$objective + 2 * length(non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_stemp_dist_Opt$par)


```


```{r, cache = TRUE, include = FALSE}
non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_stemp_sdist_cAIC <- cAIC(model_data = non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_stemp_sdist_Data,
                                              model_obj = non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_stemp_sdist_Obj,  
                                              model_parameters = non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_stemp_sdist_Params,
                                              random = c("omega_s", "epsilon_st", "b_smooth"),
                                              DLL = "non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_stemp_sdist",
                                              data_observation_names = "D_i")

non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_stemp_sdist_AIC <- 2*non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_stemp_sdist_Opt$objective + 2 * length(non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_stemp_sdist_Opt$par)

non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_temp_cAIC <- cAIC(model_data = non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_temp_Data,
                                       model_obj = non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_temp_Obj,  
                                       model_parameters = non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_temp_Params,
                                       random = c("omega_s", "epsilon_st"),
                                       DLL = "non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_temp",
                                       data_observation_names = "D_i")

non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_temp_AIC <- 2*non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_temp_Opt$objective + 2 * length(non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_temp_Opt$par)

non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_dist_cAIC <- cAIC(model_data = non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_dist_Data,
                                       model_obj = non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_dist_Obj,  
                                       model_parameters = non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_dist_Params,
                                       random = c("omega_s", "epsilon_st"),
                                       DLL = "non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_dist",
                                       data_observation_names = "D_i")

non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_dist_AIC <- 2*non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_dist_Opt$objective + 2 * length(non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_dist_Opt$par)

non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_stemp_cAIC <- cAIC(model_data = non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_stemp_Data,
                                        model_obj = non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_stemp_Obj,  
                                        model_parameters = non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_stemp_Params,
                                        random = c("omega_s", "epsilon_st", "b_smooth"),
                                        DLL = "non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_stemp",
                                        data_observation_names = "D_i")

non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_stemp_AIC <- 2*non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_stemp_Opt$objective + 2 * length(non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_stemp_Opt$par)

non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_sdist_cAIC <- cAIC(model_data = non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_sdist_Data,
                                        model_obj = non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_sdist_Obj,  
                                        model_parameters = non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_sdist_Params,
                                        random = c("omega_s", "epsilon_st", "b_smooth"),
                                        DLL = "non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_sdist",
                                        data_observation_names = "D_i")

non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_sdist_AIC <- 2*non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_sdist_Opt$objective + 2 * length(non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_sdist_Opt$par)

non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_temp_dist_cAIC <- cAIC(model_data = non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_temp_dist_Data,
                                  model_obj = non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_temp_dist_Obj,  
                                  model_parameters = non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_temp_dist_Params,
```
