```{r, cache = TRUE, include = FALSE}
                                  random = c("omega_s", "epsilon_st"),
                                  DLL = "non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_temp_dist",
                                  data_observation_names = "D_i")

non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_temp_dist_AIC <- 2*non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_temp_dist_Opt$objective + 2 * length(non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_temp_dist_Opt$par)

```


```{r, cache = TRUE, include = FALSE}
non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_stemp_sdist_year_cAIC <- cAIC(model_data = non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_stemp_sdist_year_Data,
                 model_obj = non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_stemp_sdist_year_Obj,  
                 model_parameters = non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_stemp_sdist_year_Params,
                 random = c("omega_s", "epsilon_st", "b_smooth"),
                 DLL = "non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_stemp_sdist_year",
                 data_observation_names = "D_i")

non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_stemp_sdist_year_AIC <- 2*non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_stemp_sdist_year_Opt$objective + 2 * length(non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_stemp_sdist_year_Opt$par)

non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_temp_year_cAIC <- cAIC(model_data = non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_temp_year_Data,
                 model_obj = non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_temp_year_Obj,  
                 model_parameters = non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_temp_year_Params,
                 random = c("omega_s", "epsilon_st"),
                 DLL = "non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_temp_year",
                 data_observation_names = "D_i")

non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_temp_year_AIC <- 2*non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_temp_year_Opt$objective + 2 * length(non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_temp_year_Opt$par)

non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_dist_year_cAIC <- cAIC(model_data = non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_dist_year_Data,
                 model_obj = non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_dist_year_Obj,  
                 model_parameters = non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_dist_year_Params,
                 random = c("omega_s", "epsilon_st"),
                 DLL = "non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_dist_year",
                 data_observation_names = "D_i")

non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_dist_year_AIC <- 2*non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_dist_year_Opt$objective + 2 * length(non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_dist_year_Opt$par)

non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_stemp_year_cAIC <- cAIC(model_data = non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_stemp_year_Data,
                 model_obj = non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_stemp_year_Obj,  
                 model_parameters = non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_stemp_year_Params,
                 random = c("omega_s", "epsilon_st", "b_smooth"),
                 DLL = "non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_stemp_year",
                 data_observation_names = "D_i")

non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_stemp_year_AIC <- 2*non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_stemp_year_Opt$objective + 2 * length(non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_stemp_year_Opt$par)

non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_sdist_year_cAIC <- cAIC(model_data = non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_sdist_year_Data,
                 model_obj = non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_sdist_year_Obj,  
                 model_parameters = non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_sdist_year_Params,
                 random = c("omega_s", "epsilon_st", "b_smooth"),
                 DLL = "non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_sdist_year",
                 data_observation_names = "D_i")

non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_sdist_year_AIC <- 2*non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_sdist_year_Opt$objective + 2 * length(non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_sdist_year_Opt$par)

non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_year_cAIC <- cAIC(model_data = non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_year_Data,
                 model_obj = non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_year_Obj,  
                 model_parameters = non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_year_Params,
                 random = c("omega_s", "epsilon_st"),
                 DLL = "non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_year",
                 data_observation_names = "D_i")

non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_year_AIC <- 2*non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_year_Opt$objective + 2 * length(non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_year_Opt$par)

non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_noFE_cAIC <- cAIC(model_data = non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_noFE_Data,
                 model_obj = non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_noFE_Obj,  
                 model_parameters = non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_noFE_Params,
                 random = c("omega_s", "epsilon_st"),
                 DLL = "non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_noFE",
                 data_observation_names = "D_i")

non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_noFE_AIC <- 2*non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_noFE_Opt$objective + 2 * length(non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_noFE_Opt$par)

```


```{r}
fixed_effects_model_comparison_table <- data.frame(model = c("as.factor(year) + temp + dist",
                                                             "as.factor(year) + s(temp) + s(dist)",
                                                             "as.factor(year) + temp",
                                                             "as.factor(year) + dist",
                                                             "as.factor(year) + s(temp)",
                                                             "as.factor(year) + s(dist)",
                                                             "as.factor(year)",
                                                             "temp + dist",
                                                             "s(temp) + s(dist)",
                                                             "temp",
                                                             "dist",
                                                             "s(temp)",
                                                             "s(dist)",
                                                             "as.factor(year) + s(temp) + dist",
                                                             "as.factor(year) + temp + s(dist)",
                                                             "temp + s(dist)",
                                                             "s(temp) + dist",
                                                             "no fixed effects"),
                                     AIC = c(model2_4_spatial_on_spatiotemporal_AR1_iso_AIC,
                                             non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_stemp_sdist_year_AIC,
                                             non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_temp_year_AIC,
                                             non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_dist_year_AIC,
                                             non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_stemp_year_AIC,
                                             non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_sdist_year_AIC,
                                             non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_year_AIC,
                                             non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_temp_dist_AIC,
                                             non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_stemp_sdist_AIC,
                                             non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_temp_AIC,
                                             non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_dist_AIC,
                                             non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_stemp_AIC,
                                             non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_sdist_AIC,
                                             non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_stemp_dist_year_AIC,
                                             non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_temp_sdist_year_1_AIC,
                                             non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_temp_sdist_AIC,
                                             non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_stemp_dist_AIC,
                                             non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_noFE_AIC),
                                     cAIC = c(model2_4_spatial_on_spatiotemporal_AR1_iso_cAIC,
                                              non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_stemp_sdist_year_cAIC,
                                              non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_temp_year_cAIC,
                                              non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_dist_year_cAIC,
                                              non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_stemp_year_cAIC,
                                              non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_sdist_year_cAIC,
                                              non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_year_cAIC,
                                              non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_temp_dist_cAIC,
                                             non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_stemp_sdist_cAIC,
                                             non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_temp_cAIC,
                                             non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_dist_cAIC,
                                             non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_stemp_cAIC,
                                             non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_sdist_cAIC,
                                             non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_stemp_dist_year_cAIC,
                                             non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_temp_sdist_year_1_cAIC,
                                             non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_temp_sdist_cAIC,
                                             non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_stemp_dist_cAIC,
                                              non_cancer_crab_larvae_bestfitRE_noFE_cAIC))

fixed_effects_model_comparison_table %>% 
  arrange(cAIC) %>% 
  mutate(AIC = round(AIC, 2)) %>% 
  mutate(cAIC = round(cAIC, 2)) %>% 
  kbl(caption = "AIC and cAIC scores for the fixed effect structures.") %>% 
  kable_styling(latex_options = "HOLD_position")
```




#### Export the tables of AIC and cAIC for the supplemental results
```{r}
write.csv(random_effects_model_comparison_table, here::here("R", "04_SDM_model_selection", "04.6.1_non_cancer_crab_larvae_biomass_SDM", "04.6.1_non_cancer_crab_larvae_biomass_random_effects_model_comparison_table.csv"))
write.csv(fixed_effects_model_comparison_table, here::here("R", "04_SDM_model_selection", "04.6.1_non_cancer_crab_larvae_biomass_SDM", "04.6.1_non_cancer_crab_larvae_biomass_fixed_effects_model_comparison_table.csv"))
```
